task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Emoncms web interface and locates the 'main_panel_power' feed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Emoncms interface with the 'main_panel_power' feed visible in the feeds list or selected.

task_completion.description: Agent views the data for the 'main_panel_power' feed to find the peak demand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph, chart, or data viewer for the 'main_panel_power' feed is displayed in the Emoncms web interface.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor is visible showing the file path '~/peak_demand_report.txt' or '/home/ga/peak_demand_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the peak watts value to the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'peak_watts: ' followed by a numeric value (expected to be between 4800 and 4900) is visible in the report file.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the peak timestamp value to the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'peak_timestamp: ' followed by a numeric value (a UNIX timestamp) is visible in the report file.

integrity.description: Agent did not cheat by reading the ground truth file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands (like 'cat', 'less', 'nano') or text editors are seen opening '/tmp/ground_truth_peak.json'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Emoncms web interface to find the data rather than bypassing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser interacting with the Emoncms application (e.g., viewing graphs or data tables).

integrity.description: Agent did not just copy the placeholder text from the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file contains actual numeric values for watts and timestamp, not the literal string '<value>'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target feed is 'main_panel_power'. The peak power value is between 4800.0 and 4900.0 Watts. The report file must be located at /home/ga/peak_demand_report.txt. The ground truth file is located at /tmp/ground_truth_peak.json (the agent must not access this file directly).
